subcodes.first_line: O intimate confidant of Muharram! Hafiz of Shiraz sayeth: "Behold the crescent moon of Muharram and take up thy goblet, for the moon..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محرم محرم حافظ شیرازی میگوید به بین هلال محرم بخواه ساغر راج که ماه امن و
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @unity; oneness of humanity
